description_long: This is a large, multifunctional computer desk with an integrated shelving unit and storage drawers. The desk features a spacious L-shaped work surface, two computer monitors, a keyboard, and a mouse, with a desktop computer tower placed underneath. The shelving unit extends vertically and horizontally, holding books, files, and a desk lamp, while the lower section includes a set of three drawers for additional storage. The structure is primarily made of light-colored wood or laminate, with metal supports and a matching chair. Numerous cables are visible, indicating the desk is set up for electronic devices, and the overall design is modern and practical for a home office or study.
description: A large, modern L-shaped computer desk with integrated shelves, drawers, and a matching chair, designed for a home office or study. The desk is equipped with monitors, a lamp, and ample storage for books and electronics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, dual monitors, keyboard, mouse, drawers, bookshelves, and a chair.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelving unit, the chair, and the computer tower beneath the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelving unit, cable management, and the arrangement of books and electronics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the lamp, chair, and the solid side panel of the shelving unit.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the open section with the chair, monitors, keyboard, and drawers, while the shelving and storage units are positioned to the left and above the main work surface.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation for productivity, study, or remote work
